changes.summary: Introduced BuildOS as the repository-level operating layer for future build runs.
Added Compliance Knowledge Engine rule registry, rule source tracking, jurisdiction resolver, rule evaluator, and UI provenance display.
Added Evidence Intelligence with evidence type inference, tagging, quality scoring, timeline summary, possible duplicate detection, and UI evidence quality display.
Added Image DNA Engine records, visual observation typing, image confidence scoring, image analysis helper, and active image module output.
Added Plan Review Engine with plan records, drawing type inference, missing-detail checks, plan review helper, and active engineering pathway output.
Added Assessment Intelligence with scoring, evidence completeness, priority calculation, and UI score display.
Added Report Studio with report types, audience profiles, sections, model expansion, and preview metadata.
Added Project Intelligence with status, history, search helper, audit trail, model expansion, and panel display.
Added Agent Orchestration with registry, routing, pipeline events, assessment integration, and UI display.
Added TRADESIGHT Runtime connecting evidence, assessment, report, project status, runtime events, and UI execution.
Added Production Readiness foundation with app config, self-check, deployment notes, testing notes, and README update.
Added NSW Demonstration Platform with demo cases, script, presentation mode, documentation, and README update.
Started BuildOS Agent Mode with controller and roadmap.
Added repository health diagnostics and documentation.
Added UI demo loader and wired demo loading into runtime.
Added report export foundation with TXT generation, copy, download, and metadata display.
Added evidence attachment metadata support and UI display.
Added demo polish with walkthrough guide, clearer loader, guided UI placement, and presentation styling.
Started Agent Mode v2 with a controller file and roadmap for the next build cycle.
Fixed runtime report context so Agent orchestration receives the selected report type.
